name: Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub mushrooms with a damp paper towel and trim any excess.
2. Slice or chop mushrooms into small pieces.
3. In a 3- or 4-quart saucepan, melt the margarine over medium heat.
4. Add the mushrooms to the saucepan and stir frequently until lightly browned.
5. Stir in the vegetable stock and basil. Bring mixture to a boil.
6. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and blend evaporated milk and flour together in a separate bowl.
8. Gradually add the blended mixture back into the soup, stirring constantly.
9. Return to low heat and stir until the soup thickens.
10. Add white wine. Do not allow the soup to boil again.
11. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
12. Serve hot.
